assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md: '4.4.1 -- Search for Preemptive Tasks: Proposed JQL query: project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC'

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md: '4.4.3 -- Filter by Current Stream: The current issue (TC-8021) is scoped to stream rhtpa-2.1. The preemptive task TC-8022’s summary contains (rhtpa-2.1) -- this matches the current stream. Match confirmed: TC-8022 is a preemptive task for CVE-2026-55123 in stream rhtpa-2.1.'

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md: '4.4.4a -- Link new CVE Jira to preemptive task: Proposed: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: "Depend"). This uses the standard remediation linkage (Depend), not the preemptive "Related" link.'

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md: '4.4.4b -- Remove security-preemptive label: Proposed: jira.edit_issue(TC-8022, fields={"labels": ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"]}). The security-preemptive label is removed because the task is now linked to a proper CVE Jira (TC-8021) and is no longer a preemptive task.'

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md: '4.4.4d -- Record reconciliation: Remediation already exists for stream rhtpa-2.1 via reconciled preemptive task TC-8022. Step 8 will skip remediation task creation for this stream.' triage-outcome.md: 'Step 8 -- Remediation Task Creation: SKIPPED. Step 8 skips remediation task creation for stream rhtpa-2.1 because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task (TC-8022) to this CVE Jira.'
